name: Lemon Yogurt-Poppy Seed Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease bottoms only of 12 medium muffin cups, or line with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, beat milk, oil, yogurt and egg.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except Lemon Glaze just until flour is moistened.
5. Divide batter evenly among muffin cups (about 3/4 full).
6. Bake for 16-18 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven immediately.
8. Drizzle Lemon Glaze over warm muffins.
9. For the glaze, mix ingredients until smooth and drizzling consistency.
